name: qiangqiang-game-launcher
description: 基于 QiangQiang 框架的轻量级 Steam 游戏启动器

scripts.dev:launcher: bun run build:download-qiangqiang && bun run dev:qiangqiang
scripts.build:full: bun run build:download-qiangqiang && bun run build:compile
scripts.build:download-qiangqiang: bun run build:clone && bun run build:prepare
scripts.build:clone: rm -rf temp_qiangqiang && git clone --depth 1 --branch main https://github.com/kobolingfeng/qiangqiang.git temp_qiangqiang
scripts.build:prepare: cd temp_qiangqiang && bun install && bun run setup
scripts.build:compile: cp -r src/frontend temp_qiangqiang/src/ && cp src/scanner.ts temp_qiangqiang/src/ && cp src/api.ts temp_qiangqiang/src/ && cp package.json temp_qiangqiang/ && cp app.config.json temp_qiangqiang/ && cd temp_qiangqiang && bun run build && bun run build:single
scripts.package: mkdir -p dist && cp temp_qiangqiang/dist/强强-portable.zip dist/QiangQiangGameLauncher-portable.zip 2>/dev/null || true && cp temp_qiangqiang/dist/强强-single.exe dist/QiangQiangGameLauncher.exe 2>/dev/null || true
